use_cases: Primary action trigger in forms and dashboards
Navigation and link triggering with asChild pattern
Multi-style button system supporting destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style button component built with Radix UI Slot and CVA for variant-driven styling. Features six variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and three sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Standard web accessibility with focus-visible outlines and disabled states. Lightweight atomic component suitable as a building block for any UI system.
